MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Rebecca A. Bers, Esq., CCSF Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.4224, for defendant/moving party;
Patrick Buelna, Esq. and Adante D. Pointer, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF JOHN L. BURRIS, T:510.839.5200, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: Defendant's counsel contested the tentative ruling. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT FLINT PAUL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Defendant Flint Paul's motion for summary judgment is denied.

[See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.]

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
